Package com.irurueta.units

Class SurfaceConverter

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.irurueta.units.SurfaceConverter
  • public class SurfaceConverter
extends java.lang.Object
    Does surface conversions to different units. To prevent loss of accuracy, conversion should only be done as a final step before displaying surface measurements.

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field Description
      private static double SQUARE_METERS_PER_ACRE
      Number of square meters in 1 acre.
      private static double SQUARE_METERS_PER_ARE
      Number of square meters in 1 are.
      private static double SQUARE_METERS_PER_CENTIARE
      Number of square meters in 1 centiare.

      Number of square meters in 1 decare.
      private static double SQUARE_METERS_PER_HECTARE
      Number of square meters in 1 hectare.

      Number of square meters in 1 square centimeter.
      (package private) static double SQUARE_METERS_PER_SQUARE_FOOT
      Number of square meters in 1 square foot.
      (package private) static double SQUARE_METERS_PER_SQUARE_INCH
      Number of square meters in 1 square inch.

      Number of square meters in 1 square milimeter.

    • Method Detail

      • convert

        public static void convert​(Surface input,
                           Surface output)
        Converts a surface to provided output surface unit.
        Parameters:
        input - input surface to be converted.
        output - output surface where result will be stored and containing output unit.

      • convertAndReturnNew

        public static Surface convertAndReturnNew​(Surface input,
                                          SurfaceUnit outputUnit)
        Converts a surface to requested output unit.
        Parameters:
        input - input surface to be converted.
        outputUnit - requested output unit.
        Returns:
        converted surface unit.

      • convert

        public static void convert​(Surface surface,
                           SurfaceUnit outputUnit)
        Converts and updates a surface to requested output unit.
        Parameters:
        surface - input surface to be converted and updated.
        outputUnit - requested output unit.

      • convert

        public static void convert​(Surface input,
                           SurfaceUnit outputUnit,
                           Surface result)
        Converts a surface to requested output unit.
        Parameters:
        input - input surface to be converted.
        outputUnit - requested output unit.
        result - surface unit where result will be stored.

      • convert

        public static java.lang.Number convert​(java.lang.Number input,
                                       SurfaceUnit inputUnit,
                                       SurfaceUnit outputUnit)
        Converts a surface value from input unit to provided output unit.
        Parameters:
        input - surface value.
        inputUnit - input surface unit.
        outputUnit - output surface unit.
        Returns:
        converted surface value.

      • convert

        public static double convert​(double input,
                             SurfaceUnit inputUnit,

        Converts a surface value from input unit to provided output unit.
        Parameters:

        inputUnit - input surface unit.
        outputUnit - output surface unit.
        Returns:
        converted surface value.

      • squareMeterToSquareMillimeter

        public static double squareMeterToSquareMillimeter​(double squareMeter)
        Converts provided square meter value to square millimeters.
        Parameters:
        squareMeter - square meter value.
        Returns:
        same surface converted to square millimeters.
